author: Ciprian-Florin Ifrim
name: 74.3M Ternary U-Net — BitNet b1.58 + SmearGate + EMBED_DIM=312 + NeoMuon + 4x relu2 MLP + FP8 QAT + Base-3 LZMA + Smear
blurb: 10L 768d ternary U-Net transformer with relu2 4x MLP, SmearGate, factored tied embedding (312-dim), BF16 scale storage, FP8 QAT, poly5 softcap, YaRN 2048, NeoMuon optimizer. 74.3M params in 15.95MB. Trained 100k steps (~3h) unconstrained. Sliding eval stride=16 T=0.90.
